etymology.description: 目(目) ('eye') + 袁(袁) (used for phonetic value) -> 'to see clearly'
etymology.interpretation: The character 睘(qióng, 'to see clearly') uses the element 目(目) (mù, 'eye') as the semantic component, indicating its connection with sight. The phonetic component 袁(袁) (yuán, 'long garment') indicates the pronunciation. Together, they convey the meaning of seeing clearly.
